welcome.title: Welcome to Dakota
welcome.description: This is an Alpha of the all new Bluefin. Thanks for volunteering to help!

features.title: What's the plan?
features.description: Test apps, commands and workflows. File issues. We fix them. Rinse and repeat.

community.title: Where are the docs?
community.description: Documentation at docs.projectbluefin.io. Test Bluefin's features.

developer.title: Updates
developer.description: Updates will come daily. If something is broken, file an issue.

completed.title: Become Legend
completed.description: When this is done reboot into Bluefin. Welcome to the new world!
